raw_body:
EMAIL US

Reliable Man and Van in Haywards Heath

We offer a great value man and van service which is perfect for smaller commercial or domestic moves.

How can we help you today?

Professional Man and Van

With over 30 years experience, Mark Ratcliffe are an experience team who offer a man van removals service to all residents and businesses in Haywards Heath, Burgess Hill and the neighbouring areas. We offer this 7 days a week, with no extra charge on weekend moves because we know not everyone can move on a weekday. This service is perfect for smaller moves like flat moves, small house removals, office moves and individual item delivery. We can transport your belongings short or long distance dependent on your needs. All of our drives have a good knowledge of the local and wider area so they are likely to know the quickest route to your new destination.

Our vehicles are all equipped with the latest technology to ensure the journey runs smoothly and your belongings are completely protected. The vehicles include van tie rails, furniture covers, a tool box, loading ramps, sack truck, tail lift vehicle, packing boxes, protective covers and portable wardrobe cartons.

Man with a Van Fees

Our rates are extremely good value. To make things simple, we offer two options:

Man and Van with working driver - £70 per hour  

‍Man and Van with driver only - £50 per hour (you load and unload the van)

All prices are inclusive of vat and fuel (local area) and there is no additional charges for weekend Moves. With such affordable rates, this removal option is also ideal for collection and deliveries.

Packing Services

If required, we can provide a full packing service and fragile packing option for particularly delicate items. Or, if preferred, you could pack your belongings using our high quality flat pack boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc all at a low cost which can be collected from our shop.

Self storage options 

You may require a storage facility if your new location isn't ready for you just yet. We offer self-storage, where you can store and collect your goods from our accessible units. Although we offer a range of sizes, our most popular choice is the 77 sq/ft unit. This room is rented at £30 plus vat per week. This is fantastic value money as you are receiving more space for less money than some of our local competitors! Your belongings will be stored in a secure, damp-free and safe environment, with you being the only key holder.

Reliable Removal Service in Haywards Heath

No matter if your move is local, further afield or even overseas - we can help! Call a member of our friendly team on 01323 848 008 for your complimentary quote. We are open Monday to Saturday 8:30 to 17:00 or by appointment on Sundays.
